implementation_evidence: TelemetryAggregator.ingest_event() captures all state transitions as telemetry events; AggregationSummary with span_count, alert_count, error_count
BackpressureSampler adaptive_sampling keeps critical=1.0 at all 5 buffer levels
AlertRouter.route_alert with CRITICAL→runtime.alert.critical; suppress_duplicate with cooldown
WorkerTopologySnapshot with health_score; DashboardDataProvider.get_worker_topology() counts healthy/degraded/offline
FailureExplorerResult with root_span_id, affected_spans; DashboardDataProvider.get_failure_explorer()

requirement: Every span has trace_id and span_id
implementation_evidence: TraceSpan dataclass with trace_id, span_id, parent_id mandatory fields; TraceCollector.start_span() enforces trace_id
TraceCollector.start_span() accepts parent_id parameter; span.parent_id set on creation
TraceCollector.propagate_context() returns {trace_id, parent_span_id, target_domain, source} headers
ExecutionTimelineEvent has span_id field linking to TraceSpan; DashboardDataProvider.get_execution_timeline() returns span_id per node
TraceSpan.correlation_id = f"{trace_id}:{span_id}"; ExecutionTimelineEvent.correlation_id()
test_evidence: Implemented in observability_models.py TraceSpan and ExecutionTimelineEvent

implementation_evidence: All 4 F4 components are per-instance; tracked via instance-level dicts; CompositionRoot creates fresh instances per root
test_evidence: trace_collector.py, telemetry_aggregator.py, dashboard_data_provider.py, alert_router.py all use instance-level state

implementation_evidence: DashboardDataProvider.get_dag_visualization() returns deterministic result per (dag_id, execution_id); _compute_critical_path is pure
TraceCollector.end_span() removes span from _active_spans; completed spans are appended to read-only list
AggregationStateMachine.guard_flush_retry allows 3 retries; TelemetryAggregator.flush_window preserves buffer on failure
BackpressureSampler.should_sample() returns True for Severity.CRITICAL at all buffer levels; dropped_critical counter tracked
AlertRouter.suppress_duplicate() returns True within cooldown window; per-key cooldown tracking
AggregationStateMachine TERMINAL_STATES = {PERSISTED}; no transitions from terminal; AggregationState enum with 7 states
TelemetryAggregator.publish_summary() skips already-published window keys; AlertRouter.route_alert() returns existing receipt for duplicate alert_id
DashboardDataProvider.get_execution_timeline(execution_id, since_ns) returns sorted events with node_id, transition, span_id
DashboardDataProvider.get_dag_visualization(dag_id, execution_id) enriches nodes with status from timeline
DashboardDataProvider.get_worker_topology(worker_ids) returns WorkerTopologyView with counts
DashboardDataProvider.get_failure_explorer(trace_id, span_id) returns FailureExplorerResult with root_span_id
AlertRouter with evaluate_threshold, route_alert, suppress_duplicate(composite key + cooldown)
